subject: English
chapter: The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse

questions.q: Who is the narrator of the story 'The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse'?
opts: (A) An elderly man
(B) A young girl
(C) An old woman
(D) A boy
questions.explanation: The narrator is an elderly man who has lived in the village his whole life, and his memories of the beautiful white horse bring back nostalgic feelings.

questions.q: What is the significance of the beautiful white horse in the story?
opts: (A) It symbolizes freedom and adventure
(B) It symbolizes the narrator's past happiness
(C) It symbolizes the beauty of nature
(D) It symbolizes the narrator's regret
questions.explanation: The beautiful white horse represents the narrator's past happiness and his memories of it bring back a sense of nostalgia and longing.

questions.q: What is the tone of the story 'The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse'?
opts: (A) Melancholic and nostalgic
(B) Happy and carefree
(C) Sad and regretful
(D) Angry and bitter
questions.explanation: The story has a melancholic and nostalgic tone, as the narrator reminisces about his past and the beautiful white horse.

questions.q: Who is the main character of the story 'The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse'?
opts: (A) The narrator
(B) The beautiful white horse
(C) The villagers
(D) The horse's owner
questions.explanation: The narrator is the main character of the story, as the story revolves around his memories and experiences.

opts: (A) A rural village
